reason: Supervised launch contract was derived from Guided Collaboration, Project Brief, Project Graph and task source.

candidate_launch.task: TKT-070 - Agent Runtime Done Ledger do ARTEMIS Symphony
candidate_launch.reason: The next safe step is a command plan that consumes launcher preflight evidence without starting paid/runtime agents.

launch_profiles.name: Codex app-server
launch_profiles.purpose: Receber tarefas remotas ou web e manter supervisao por artifacts, approvals e Validation Gate.

launch_profiles.name: Claude Code
launch_profiles.purpose: Mapear repositorio, entender linguagem e executar tarefas medias com checkpoints curtos.

launch_profiles.name: Codex terminal-first
launch_profiles.purpose: Atuar como executor principal local quando a tarefa exige controle fino, git e verificacao ampla.

launch_profiles.name: Verifier
launch_profiles.purpose: Validar evidencia, testes, logs, screenshots e claims antes de Done ou handoff.

launch_gates.label: Project
launch_gates.rule: A launch request must name the repository/project and the canonical AGENTS.md contract.

launch_gates.label: Task
launch_gates.rule: A launch request must point to an Exec Pack or explicit task artifact with objective, scope and risk.

launch_gates.label: Auth
launch_gates.rule: Any Codex app-server, Claude Code, GitHub or account-backed runtime requires explicit human authentication.

launch_gates.label: Budget
launch_gates.rule: Model, max tokens/cost, max agents, max wall time and stop rule must be declared before runtime.

launch_gates.label: Command
launch_gates.rule: The exact command surface must be reviewed; launch remains execute=false until the next contract authorizes it.

launch_gates.label: Workspace
launch_gates.rule: Agent write scope, branch/worktree, lock and dirty-state policy must be known before execution.

launch_gates.label: Validation
launch_gates.rule: The task must name tests, static checks, screenshots or artifacts that prove completion.

launch_gates.label: Rollback
launch_gates.rule: A clean abort path and artifacts to preserve on failure must be listed before runtime.

launch_gates.label: Remote write
launch_gates.rule: Push, PR, issue mutation, deploy and production writes remain blocked until explicit human approval.

evidence_contract.label: Launch request
evidence_contract.proof: Project, task, runtime profile, budget, auth state, command surface and stop rule are explicit.

evidence_contract.label: Preflight
evidence_contract.proof: Contract is internally valid and read-only safety invariants are intact.

evidence_contract.label: Runtime logs
evidence_contract.proof: When runtime exists, every agent turn must be tied to task, budget, command and evidence.

evidence_contract.label: Handoff
evidence_contract.proof: Next action is known and unresolved gates are visible.

invariants: Agent Launch Contract is planning authority only; it never starts runtime.
execute=false is the default for every launch profile.
Human approval is required before auth-backed, paid, remote, production or long-running work.
Validation Gate and rollback evidence must be declared before a task can move to Done.
Git, Exec Packs, Event Log, artifacts and AGENTS.md remain canonical.
next_cut: TKT-080 - ARTEMIS Portal Task Control Surface Contract
